design_system.responsive_strategy: Tailwind breakpoints — scale 1920 designs down via container max-w-7xl + responsive font-size tokens (text-h1..h5, text-mini). Mobile-first stacking for hero, grids, footer.

responsive_concerns: All designs are at 1920px native — implement with Tailwind container `max-w-7xl` (1280) or `max-w-[1472px]` to match the 1472-wide content gutter.
ListingHero overlay text needs responsive font sizing — Host Grotesk Bold 60px (desktop) should map to text-h1 token, which already has clamp behavior.
SiteHeader nav collapses to hamburger sheet (existing sheet.tsx) under md breakpoint.
SiteFooter 4-col link grid collapses to 2-col @ md → 1-col @ sm.
Hero background images are massive (2519 × 872) — serve via next/image with sizes attribute + responsive crops.

uncertain.reason: The Online Advanced Certifications frame has no SiteFooter child. Assumed it inherits via layout, but Figma file may treat it as a partial. Confirm before final assembly.
1:1547 has 3 pill indicators (73/53/53 wide) that look like tabs, but no labeled text exists in the metadata. Inferring 'All / Online / Offline' from context — confirm with design.

uncertain.issue: ProgramCard 'online' floating badge — 4 of 9 cards in 1:2343
uncertain.reason: Only 4 cards have explicit 'Overlay+Border' pills in metadata. Other 5 may use a different badge style or no badge. Treat mode as a card-level prop and always render it consistently.

ArticleCard (1:7174) and ProgramCard (1:2343) share 472-wide footprint and gradient image but differ in title typography, height (321 vs 431), and meta row. Decide whether to merge via variant prop or keep as separate components.
The second 'Top Popular Yoga Course' sub-grid (1:5128) may just be a continuation of the parent PopularCoursesSection grid. Inspect layout — could collapse into one section.
